description_long: This is a full drum kit featuring a large bass drum with the brand name 'NATAL' printed on the front, two mounted toms, a floor tom, a snare drum, and three cymbals (hi-hat, crash, and ride) mounted on metal stands. The shells of the drums are finished in a dark, glossy blue with visible wood grain, while the drum heads are white and slightly reflective. The hardware, including the stands, pedals, and rims, is metallic and appears sturdy, with chrome or polished steel finishes. The kit includes a padded, round drum stool with a black seat and metal legs. The cymbals have a bronze or brass appearance, with a slightly matte finish and visible hammering marks. The overall setup is compact and typical for use in urban environments such as music studios, garages, or street performances.
description: A complete blue-finished drum kit with chrome hardware, three cymbals, and a branded bass drum, set up with a matching stool. The kit features metallic stands and a mix of white drum heads and bronze cymbals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'NATAL' logo on the bass drum, two mounted toms, and the arrangement of cymbals and snare.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the bass drum, the floor tom, and the drum stool, with cymbals and toms visible from behind.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the drum stool, floor tom, and the full spread of cymbals and toms from the drummer's perspective.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the side of the bass drum, the floor tom, and the hi-hat pedal, with the stool and cymbals in profile.
